result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  FluentPulumiCli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate <resourceGroupName> <inputStack>  Command for generating pulumi import file for resource group
  importrole <adAppName> <roleFile>          Command for importing roles from azure ad to role file
  getwebappid <inputStack>                   Command for retrieving web app/function app ids. One id on each line
  getwebappslotidsjson <inputStack>          Command for retrieving web app slot/function app slot ids. One id on each line

result.stdout:
Description:
  Command for generating pulumi import file for resource group

Usage:
  FluentPulumiCli generate <resourceGroupName> <inputStack> [options]

Arguments:
  <resourceGroupName>  The resource group name
  <inputStack>         The stack to add all resources to

Options:
  --remove <remove>  Space seperated list with type name that should not be imported
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

Description:
  Command for retrieving web app/function app ids. One id on each line

Usage:
  FluentPulumiCli getwebappid <inputStack> [options]

Arguments:
  <inputStack>  The current pulumi stack

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Command for importing roles from azure ad to role file

Usage:
  FluentPulumiCli importrole <adAppName> <roleFile> [options]

Arguments:
  <adAppName>  The name or prefix name of the ad application
  <roleFile>   The role file for pulumi

Options:
  --environment <environment>  Explicit define which environment should be used. This will return an error if more then one application is found
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

  <roleFile>   The role file for pulumi

Options:

  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
